channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car park being used as building site, 4th March
item.description:
The car park is being used as a building site with building materials taking up most of the area. Someone has also extended their garden to use part of the car park area and the ground at the back of the canal on the bank to extend their garden.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walsham Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People Camping, 4th March
item.description:
There have been people camping at East wickham open space for the last few months, two tents they are by the bushes and behind Woolwich cemetery. Please can this be looked into, as surely they shouldn't be doing this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broadwalk, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th March
item.description:
Dumped furniture in the night, prolific problem here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alford Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken wardrobe thrown onto street, 4th March
item.description:
This appeared overnight. It is a consistent problem with flytipping coming from one building and quickly attracting more fly tipping and rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rusty barrel barbecue dumped on pavement, 4th March
item.description:
Rusty old barrel barbecue dumped on pavement and causing obstructtion

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Park, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dog fouling, 4th March
item.description:
Please clean dog fouling

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Scoble Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General household rubbish, 4th March
item.description:
Bags of what looks like general household rubbish in carrier bags are continually being dumped in this area. Mainly in the wooded area of Fairmead Close and also in the alleyway leading to Springfield Road/Springfield Gardens. This is happening on a regular basis. The bags get torn apart by foxes and there is normally food items inside.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairmead Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Percy street and Charlotte street between 'The Italians', 'Andrew Jose Salon' 'Italian Bear Chocolate' and corner shop, 4th March
item.description:
Uneven surface, unsafe tarmac finish. The tarmac repair job took the whole day on Sunday 01 March 2026 and affected the residential and business area, left uneven poor ugly looking surface, unsafe for cyclists, pedestrians and cars. It was intentionally poor work: the yellow lines drawn over potholes they and drawn over the unfinished surface that is left looking completely ugly, unsafe and unnecessary . Please repair this and make it look nice and safe for all.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Charlotte Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 4th March
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 04/03/26 09:19 Pothole Lat/Long - 51.4292538, 0.0386239 what3words - hotels.looked.areas Nearest address - 81 Dunkery Road, Mottingham, London, SE9 4HY Opposite no 81. Pot hole in road Reference - 5379446 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 04/03/2026 09:18 Opposite no 81. Pot hole in road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Dunkery Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste from drain on pavement., 4th March
item.description:
The drain nearest the pavement waa blocked for a couple of weeks and water was going on to the pavement from the road. Also the drain on the pavement in the pucture was leaking and caused waste/used tissue to spill on and stick to pavement. Thames water has been in the area recently and the flooding has gone but the waste on the pavement needs to be jetwashed off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4-7, Lime Row, Lower Belvedere, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car in Sanctuary Car Park, 4th March
item.description:
This car has been abandoned for almost a year. Unclaimed dumped and taking up valuable car parking space for residents that live under Sanctaury housing. Needs to be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingshold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge, 4th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Chinbrook, Greater London

item.title: Manhole damaged and extremely noisy, 4th March
item.description:
Ref. 23182521 This damaged manhole/drain cover still hasn’t been fixed despite many complaints to yourselves, it is very noisy and there is now also another one a few metre along which is also now noisy. I would appreciate your immediate attention regarding this matter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chestnut Close, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas Bottles, 4th March
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 04/03/26 08:29 Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.425626, -0.030278 what3words - shiny.drift.that Nearest address - 36 Montana Gardens, Lower Sydenham, London, SE26 5BF Gas cannisters left by the dog bin on the river walkway. Reference - 5379220 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 04/03/2026 08:28 Gas cannisters left by the dog bin on the river walkway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowview Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tons of. Rubbish a. Sofa and shopping. Trollies filled with rubbish, 4th March
item.description:
Constant issues from flats ubove parade of shops on park view road Down alley way in between Bethel road and gypsy rpad
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park View Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large items on the pavement, 4th March
item.description:
I reported this recently. It was later marked as resolved, but it hasn’t been. There are also items on both sides of the pavement further down. Items are dumped here all the time.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Margaret Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It is parked in a housing associations designated parking space for tenants., 4th March
item.description:
The car needs to be removed, as it doesn't belong to any tenants in the building and is taking up a space that is causing a nuisance to tenants. it has been parked and not moved for almost a year.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heron Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked DRain, 4th March
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 04/03/26 08:13 Blocked Street Drains/Gullies Lat/Long - 51.4244733, -0.0343277 what3words - native.levels.urban Nearest address - Bronze House, Kangley Bridge Road, Lower Sydenham, London, SE26 5AY Blocked and causes flowing water every time it rains Reference - 5379156 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 04/03/2026 08:12 Blocked and causes flowing water every time it rains
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kangley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 goods way, 4th March
item.description:
Good morning, I am writing to report a problem with the cycling lane in Goods way, coming from York Wy. Coordinates: 51.53494412231959, -0.12371328957259632 https://maps.app.goo.gl/eJ4uZhvxwk4L8eVA6 In particular the cycling lane on the left hand side (coming from York Wy is obstructed by the barriers and various other items the Google construction site is placing there. The lane is now, in places, about half its original width as the barrier to the construction side is pushed more and more into it. I attach a photo with the problem areas annotated, however the problem is now worse than it appears on the Google maps photo (which is a few months old), especially around 9-9:30am when there is lots of activity. This is creating a dangerous situation for cyclists using the lane, especially when tlf buses pass or trucks that work with the Google construction site intentionally drive over the lane to position themselves better as they are preparing to turn sharp left into the construction site. I do expect a serious accident involving a cyclist and a heavy truck if this is not addressed. Kind regards, A
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goods Way, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
